4265 //printf("-> ml2=%d\n",ml2->numDecMembers());
4266 }
4267 // also include grouped members that have their own section in the class (see bug 722759)
4268 if (inheritedFrom)
4269 {
4270 for (const auto &mg : m_impl->memberGroups)
4271 {
4272 count+=mg->countGroupedInheritedMembers(lt);
4273 if (lt2!=-1) count+=mg->countGroupedInheritedMembers(static_cast<MemberListType>(lt2));
4274 }
4275 }
4276 bool inlineInheritedMembers = Config_getBool(INLINE_INHERITED_MEMB);
4277 if (!inlineInheritedMembers) // show inherited members as separate lists
4278 {
4279 count+=countInheritedDecMembers(lt,inheritedFrom,invert,showAlways,visitedClasses);
4280 }
4281 }
4282 //printf("-> %d\n",count);
4283 return count;
4284}

4015 {
4016 templateClass->addInnerCompound(innerClass);
4017 innerClass->setOuterScope(templateClass);

4019 innerClass->setArtificial(TRUE);
4020 }
4021 }
4022 freshInstance=TRUE;
4023 }
4024 }

void ClassDefImpl::internalInsertMember ( const MemberDef *  md,
Protection  prot,
bool  addToAllList

Definition at line 848 of file classdef.cpp.

852{
853 //printf("insertInternalMember(%s) isHidden()=%d\n",qPrint(md->name()),md->isHidden());
854 if (md->isHidden()) return;
855
856 if (getLanguage()==SrcLangExt_VHDL)
857 {
858 QCString title=theTranslator->trVhdlType(md->getMemberSpecifiers(),FALSE);
859 m_impl->vhdlSummaryTitles.insert(title.str());
860 }
861
862 if (1 /*!isReference()*/) // changed to 1 for showing members of external
863 // classes when HAVE_DOT and UML_LOOK are enabled.
864 {
865 bool isSimple=FALSE;
866
867 /********************************************/
868 /* insert member in the declaration section */
869 /********************************************/
870 if (md->isRelated() && protectionLevelVisible(prot))
871 {
872 addMemberToList(MemberListType_related,md,TRUE);
873 }
874 else if (md->isFriend())
875 {
876 addMemberToList(MemberListType_friends,md,TRUE);
877 }
878 else
879 {
880 switch (md->memberType())
881 {
882 case MemberType_Service: // UNO IDL
883 addMemberToList(MemberListType_services,md,TRUE);
884 break;
885 case MemberType_Interface: // UNO IDL
886 addMemberToList(MemberListType_interfaces,md,TRUE);
887 break;
888 case MemberType_Signal: // Qt specific
889 addMemberToList(MemberListType_signals,md,TRUE);
890 break;
891 case MemberType_DCOP: // KDE2 specific
892 addMemberToList(MemberListType_dcopMethods,md,TRUE);
893 break;
894 case MemberType_Property:
895 addMemberToList(MemberListType_properties,md,TRUE);
896 break;
897 case MemberType_Event:
898 addMemberToList(MemberListType_events,md,TRUE);
899 break;
900 case MemberType_Slot: // Qt specific
901 switch (prot)
902 {
903 case Protected:
904 case Package: // slots in packages are not possible!
905 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proSlots,md,TRUE);
906 break;
907 case Public:
908 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubSlots,md,TRUE);
909 break;
910 case Private:
911 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priSlots,md,TRUE);
912 break;
913 }
914 break;
915 default: // any of the other members
916 if (md->isStatic())
917 {
918 if (md->isVariable())
919 {
920 switch (prot)
921 {
922 case Protected:
923 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
924 break;
925 case Package:
926 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
927 break;
928 case Public:
929 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
930 break;
931 case Private:
932 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
933 break;
934 }
935 }
936 else // function
937 {
938 switch (prot)
939 {
940 case Protected:
941 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
942 break;
943 case Package:
944 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
945 break;
946 case Public:
947 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
948 break;
949 case Private:
950 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
951 break;
952 }
953 }
954 }
955 else // not static
956 {
957 if (md->isVariable())
958 {
959 switch (prot)
960 {
961 case Protected:
962 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proAttribs,md,TRUE);
963 break;
964 case Package:
965 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacAttribs,md,TRUE);
966 break;
967 case Public:
968 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubAttribs,md,TRUE);
969 isSimple=!md->isFunctionPtr();
970 break;
971 case Private:
972 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priAttribs,md,TRUE);
973 break;
974 }
975 }
976 else if (md->isTypedef() || md->isEnumerate() || md->isEnumValue())
977 {
978 switch (prot)
979 {
980 case Protected:
981 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proTypes,md,TRUE);
982 break;
983 case Package:
984 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacTypes,md,TRUE);
985 break;
986 case Public:
987 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubTypes,md,TRUE);
988 isSimple=!md->isEnumerate() &&
989 !md->isEnumValue() &&
990 QCString(md->typeString()).find(")(")==-1; // func ptr typedef
991 break;
992 case Private:
993 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priTypes,md,TRUE);
994 break;
995 }
996 }
997 else // member function
998 {
999 switch (prot)
1000 {
1001 case Protected:
1002 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proMethods,md,TRUE);
1003 break;
1004 case Package:
1005 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacMethods,md,TRUE);
1006 break;
1007 case Public:
1008 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubMethods,md,TRUE);
1009 break;
1010 case Private:
1011 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priMethods,md,TRUE);
1012 break;
1013 }
1014 }
1015 }
1016 break;
1017 }
1018 }
1019 if (!isSimple) // not a simple field -> not a simple struct
1020 {
1021 m_impl->isSimple = FALSE;
1022 }
1023 //printf("adding %s simple=%d total_simple=%d\n",qPrint(name()),isSimple,m_impl->isSimple);
1024
1025 /*******************************************************/
1026 /* insert member in the detailed documentation section */
1027 /*******************************************************/
1028 if ((md->isRelated() && protectionLevelVisible(prot)) || md->isFriend())
1029 {
1030 addMemberToList(MemberListType_relatedMembers,md,FALSE);
1031 }
1032 else if (md->isFunction() && md->protection()==Private && md->virtualness()!=Normal && Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIV_VIRTUAL))
1033 {
1034 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1035 }
1036 else
1037 {
1038 switch (md->memberType())
1039 {
1040 case MemberType_Service: // UNO IDL
1041 addMemberToList(MemberListType_serviceMembers,md,FALSE);
1042 break;
1043 case MemberType_Interface: // UNO IDL
1044 addMemberToList(MemberListType_interfaceMembers,md,FALSE);
1045 break;
1046 case MemberType_Property:
1047 addMemberToList(MemberListType_propertyMembers,md,FALSE);
1048 break;
1049 case MemberType_Event:
1050 addMemberToList(MemberListType_eventMembers,md,FALSE);
1051 break;
1052 case MemberType_Signal: // fall through
1053 case MemberType_DCOP:
1054 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1055 break;
1056 case MemberType_Slot:
1057 if (protectionLevelVisible(prot))
1058 {
1059 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1060 }
1061 break;
1062 default: // any of the other members
1063 if (protectionLevelVisible(prot))
1064 {
1065 switch (md->memberType())
1066 {
1067 case MemberType_Typedef:
1068 addMemberToList(MemberListType_typedefMembers,md,FALSE);
1069 break;
1070 case MemberType_Enumeration:
1071 addMemberToList(MemberListType_enumMembers,md,FALSE);
1072 break;
1073 case MemberType_EnumValue:
1074 addMemberToList(MemberListType_enumValMembers,md,FALSE);
1075 break;
1076 case MemberType_Function:
1077 if (md->isConstructor() || md->isDestructor())
1078 {
1079 m_impl->memberLists.get(MemberListType_constructors,MemberListContainer::Class)->push_back(md);
1080 }
1081 else
1082 {
1083 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1084 }
1085 break;
1086 case MemberType_Variable:
1087 addMemberToList(MemberListType_variableMembers,md,FALSE);
1088 break;
1089 case MemberType_Define:
1090 warn(md->getDefFileName(),md->getDefLine()-1,"A define (%s) cannot be made a member of %s",
1091 qPrint(md->name()), qPrint(this->name()));
1092 break;
1093 default:
1094 err("Unexpected member type %d found!\n",md->memberType());
1095 }
1096 }
1097 break;
1098 }
1099 }
1100
1101 /*************************************************/
1102 /* insert member in the appropriate member group */
1103 /*************************************************/
1104 // Note: this must be done AFTER inserting the member in the
1105 // regular groups
1106 //addMemberToGroup(md,groupId);
1107
1108 }
1109
1110 if (md->virtualness()==Pure)
1111 {
1112 m_impl->isAbstract=TRUE;
1113 }
1114
1115 if (md->name()=="operator->")
1116 {
1117 m_impl->arrowOperator=md;
1118 }
1119
1120 //::addClassMemberNameToIndex(md);
1121 if (addToAllList &&
1122 !(Config_getBool(HIDE_FRIEND_COMPOUNDS) &&
1123 md->isFriend() &&
1124 (QCString(md->typeString())=="friend class" ||
1125 QCString(md->typeString())=="friend struct" ||
1126 QCString(md->typeString())=="friend union")))
1127 {
1128 //printf("=======> adding member %s to class %s\n",qPrint(md->name()),qPrint(name()));
1129
1130 MemberNameInfo *mni = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap.add(md->name());
1131 mni->push_back(std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(md,prot,md->virtualness(),FALSE));
1132 }
1133}

Returns TRUE iff bcd is a direct or indirect base class of this class.

This function will recursively traverse all branches of the inheritance tree.

3377 const ClassDef *ccd = bclass.classDef;

3379 if (ccd==bcd)
3380 {
3381 distance=1;
3382 break; // no shorter path possible
3383 }
3384 else
3385 {
3386 int d = ccd->isBaseClass(bcd,followInstances);
3387 if (d>256)

3390 return 0;

3393 {
3394 if (distance==0 || d+1<distance) // update if no path found yet or shorter path found

3396 distance=d+1;

3398 }
3399 }
3400 }
3401 return distance;

3669 ClassDefMutable *category = toClassDefMutable(cat);
3670 if (category)
3671 {
3672 bool extractLocalMethods = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_LOCAL_METHODS);
3673 bool makePrivate = category->isLocal();
3674 // in case extract local methods is not enabled we don't add the methods
3675 // of the category in case it is defined in the .m file.
3676 if (makePrivate && !extractLocalMethods) return;
3677 bool isExtension = category->isExtension();
3678
3679 category->setCategoryOf(this);
3680 if (isExtension)
3681 {
3682 category->setArtificial(TRUE);
3683
3684 // copy base classes/protocols from extension
3685 for (const auto &bcd : category->baseClasses())
3686 {
3687 insertBaseClass(bcd.classDef,bcd.usedName,bcd.prot,bcd.virt,bcd.templSpecifiers);
3688 // correct bcd.classDef so that they do no longer derive from
3689 // category, but from this class!
3690 BaseClassList scl = bcd.classDef->subClasses();
3691 for (auto &scd : scl)
3692 {
3693 if (scd.classDef==category)
3694 {
3695 scd.classDef=this;
3696 }
3697 }

3700 }
3701 // make methods private for categories defined in the .m file
3702 //printf("%s::mergeCategory makePrivate=%d\n",qPrint(name()),makePrivate);

3705 MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &dstMnd = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap;
3706

3708 {
3709 MemberNameInfo *dstMni=dstMnd.find(srcMni->memberName());

3711 {
3712 //printf("Existing member %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3713 auto &dstMi = dstMni->front();
3714 auto &srcMi = srcMni->front();
3715 if (srcMi && dstMi)
3716 {
3717 MemberDefMutable *smdm = toMemberDefMutable(srcMi->memberDef());
3718 MemberDefMutable *dmdm = toMemberDefMutable(dstMi->memberDef());
3719 if (smdm && dmdm)
3720 {
3721 combineDeclarationAndDefinition(smdm,dmdm);
3722 dmdm->setCategory(category);
3723 dmdm->setCategoryRelation(smdm);
3724 smdm->setCategoryRelation(dmdm);
3725 }
3726 }
3727 }
3728 else // new method name
3729 {
3730 //printf("New member %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3731 // create a deep copy of the list
3732 MemberNameInfo *newMni = dstMnd.add(srcMni->memberName());
3733
3734 // copy the member(s) from the category to this class
3735 for (auto &mi : *srcMni)
3736 {
3737 //printf("Adding '%s'\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3738 Protection prot = mi->prot();
3739 //if (makePrivate) prot = Private;
3740 std::unique_ptr<MemberDefMutable> newMd { toMemberDefMutable(mi->memberDef()->deepCopy()) };
3741 if (newMd)
3742 {
3743 //printf("Copying member %s\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3744 newMd->moveTo(this);
3745
3746 std::unique_ptr<MemberInfo> newMi=std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(newMd.get(),prot,mi->virt(),mi->inherited());
3747 newMi->setScopePath(mi->scopePath());
3748 newMi->setAmbigClass(mi->ambigClass());
3749 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(mi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3750 newMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3751
3752 // also add the newly created member to the global members list
3753
3754 QCString name = newMd->name();
3755 MemberName *mn = Doxygen::memberNameLinkedMap->add(name);
3756
3757 if (newMd)
3758 {
3759 newMd->setCategory(category);
3760 newMd->setCategoryRelation(mi->memberDef());
3761 }
3762 MemberDefMutable *mdm = toMemberDefMutable(mi->memberDef());
3763 if (mdm)
3764 {
3765 mdm->setCategoryRelation(newMd.get());
3766 }
3767 if (newMd && (makePrivate || isExtension))
3768 {
3769 newMd->makeImplementationDetail();
3770 }
3771 internalInsertMember(newMd.get(),prot,FALSE);
3772 mn->push_back(std::move(newMd));
3773 }
3774 }
3775 }
3776 }

◆ mergeMembers()

void ClassDefImpl::mergeMembers ( )
virtual

recursively merges the 'all members' lists of a class base with that of this class. Must only be called for classes without subclasses!

Implements ClassDefMutable.

3439 if (m_impl->membersMerged) return;
3440
3441 //bool optimizeOutputForJava = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_JAVA);
3442 //bool vhdlOpt = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_VHDL);
3443 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
3444 QCString sep=getLanguageSpecificSeparator(lang,TRUE);
3445 uint sepLen = sep.length();
3446
3447 m_impl->membersMerged=TRUE;
3448 //printf(" mergeMembers for %s\n",qPrint(name()));
3449 bool inlineInheritedMembers = Config_getBool(INLINE_INHERITED_MEMB);
3450 bool extractPrivate = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIVATE);
3451 for (const auto &bcd : baseClasses())
3452 {
3453 ClassDefMutable *bClass=toClassDefMutable(bcd.classDef);
3454 if (bClass)
3455 {
3456 // merge the members in the base class of this inheritance branch first
3457 bClass->mergeMembers();
3458 if (bClass->getLanguage()==SrcLangExt_Python) continue; // python does not have member overloading, see issue 8480
3459
3460 const MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &srcMnd = bClass->memberNameInfoLinkedMap();
3461 MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &dstMnd = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap;
3462
3463 for (auto &srcMni : srcMnd)
3464 {
3465 //printf(" Base member name %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3466 MemberNameInfo *dstMni;
3467 if ((dstMni=dstMnd.find(srcMni->memberName())))
3468 // a member with that name is already in the class.
3469 // the member may hide or reimplement the one in the sub class
3470 // or there may be another path to the base class that is already
3471 // visited via another branch in the class hierarchy.
3472 {
3473 for (auto &srcMi : *srcMni)
3474 {
3475 const MemberDef *srcMd = srcMi->memberDef();
3476 bool found=FALSE;
3477 bool ambiguous=FALSE;
3478 bool hidden=FALSE;
3479 const ClassDef *srcCd = srcMd->getClassDef();
3480 for (auto &dstMi : *dstMni)
3481 {
3482 const MemberDef *dstMd = dstMi->memberDef();
3483 if (srcMd!=dstMd) // different members
3484 {
3485 const ClassDef *dstCd = dstMd->getClassDef();
3486 //printf(" Is %s a base class of %s?\n",qPrint(srcCd->name()),qPrint(dstCd->name()));
3487 if (srcCd==dstCd || dstCd->isBaseClass(srcCd,TRUE))
3488 // member is in the same or a base class
3489 {
3490 ArgumentList &srcAl = const_cast<ArgumentList&>(srcMd->argumentList());
3491 ArgumentList &dstAl = const_cast<ArgumentList&>(dstMd->argumentList());
3492 found=matchArguments2(
3493 srcMd->getOuterScope(),srcMd->getFileDef(),&srcAl,
3494 dstMd->getOuterScope(),dstMd->getFileDef(),&dstAl,
3495 TRUE,getLanguage()
3496 );
3497 //printf(" Yes, matching (%s<->%s): %d\n",
3498 // qPrint(argListToString(srcMd->argumentList())),
3499 // qPrint(argListToString(dstMd->argumentList())),
3500 // found);
3501 hidden = hidden || !found;
3502 }
3503 else // member is in a non base class => multiple inheritance
3504 // using the same base class.
3505 {
3506 //printf("$$ Existing member %s %s add scope %s\n",
3507 // qPrint(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3508 // qPrint(dstMd->name()),
3509 // qPrint(dstMi->scopePath.left(dstMi->scopePath.find("::")+2));
3510
3511 QCString scope=dstMi->scopePath().left(dstMi->scopePath().find(sep)+sepLen);
3512 if (scope!=dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3513 {
3514 dstMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(scope+dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3515 }
3516 ambiguous=TRUE;
3517 }
3518 }
3519 else // same members
3520 {
3521 // do not add if base class is virtual or
3522 // if scope paths are equal or
3523 // if base class is an interface (and thus implicitly virtual).
3524 //printf("same member found srcMi->virt=%d dstMi->virt=%d\n",srcMi->virt,dstMi->virt);
3525 if ((srcMi->virt()!=Normal && dstMi->virt()!=Normal) ||
3526 bClass->name()+sep+srcMi->scopePath() == dstMi->scopePath() ||
3527 dstMd->getClassDef()->compoundType()==Interface
3528 )
3529 {
3530 found=TRUE;
3531 }
3532 else // member can be reached via multiple paths in the
3533 // inheritance tree
3534 {
3535 //printf("$$ Existing member %s %s add scope %s\n",
3536 // qPrint(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3537 // qPrint(dstMd->name()),
3538 // qPrint(dstMi->scopePath.left(dstMi->scopePath.find("::")+2));
3539
3540 QCString scope=dstMi->scopePath().left(dstMi->scopePath().find(sep)+sepLen);
3541 if (scope!=dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3542 {
3543 dstMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope()+scope);
3544 }
3545 ambiguous=TRUE;
3546 }
3547 }
3548 if (found) break;
3549 }
3550 //printf("member %s::%s hidden %d ambiguous %d srcMi->ambigClass=%p\n",
3551 // qPrint(srcCd->name()),qPrint(srcMd->name()),hidden,ambiguous,srcMi->ambigClass);
3552
3553 // TODO: fix the case where a member is hidden by inheritance
3554 // of a member with the same name but with another prototype,
3555 // while there is more than one path to the member in the
3556 // base class due to multiple inheritance. In this case
3557 // it seems that the member is not reachable by prefixing a
3558 // scope name either (according to my compiler). Currently,
3559 // this case is shown anyway.
3560 if (!found && srcMd->protection()!=Private && !srcMd->isFriend())
3561 {
3562 Protection prot=srcMd->protection();
3563 if (bcd.prot==Protected && prot==Public) prot=bcd.prot;
3564 else if (bcd.prot==Private) prot=bcd.prot;
3565
3566 if (inlineInheritedMembers)
3567 {
3568 if (!isStandardFunc(srcMd))
3569 {
3570 //printf(" insertMember '%s'\n",qPrint(srcMd->name()));
3571 internalInsertMember(srcMd,prot,FALSE);
3572 }
3573 }
3574
3575 Specifier virt=srcMi->virt();
3576 if (virt==Normal && bcd.virt!=Normal) virt=bcd.virt;
3577
3578 std::unique_ptr<MemberInfo> newMi = std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(srcMd,prot,virt,TRUE);
3579 newMi->setScopePath(bClass->name()+sep+srcMi->scopePath());
3580 if (ambiguous)
3581 {
3582 //printf("$$ New member %s %s add scope %s::\n",
3583 // qPrint(srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3584 // qPrint(srcMd->name()),
3585 // qPrint(bClass->name()));
3586
3587 QCString scope=bClass->name()+sep;
3588 if (scope!=srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3589 {
3590 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(scope+srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3591 }
3592 }
3593 if (hidden)
3594 {
3595 if (srcMi->ambigClass()==0)
3596 {
3597 newMi->setAmbigClass(bClass);
3598 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(bClass->name()+sep);
3599 }
3600 else
3601 {
3602 newMi->setAmbigClass(srcMi->ambigClass());
3603 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(srcMi->ambigClass()->name()+sep);
3604 }
3605 }
3606 dstMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3607 }
3608 }
3609 }
3610 else // base class has a member that is not in the sub class => copy
3611 {
3612 // create a deep copy of the list (only the MemberInfo's will be
3613 // copied, not the actual MemberDef's)
3614 MemberNameInfo *newMni = dstMnd.add(srcMni->memberName());
3615
3616 // copy the member(s) from the base to the sub class
3617 for (auto &mi : *srcMni)
3618 {
3619 if (!mi->memberDef()->isFriend()) // don't inherit friends
3620 {
3621 Protection prot = mi->prot();
3622 if (bcd.prot==Protected)
3623 {
3624 if (prot==Public) prot=Protected;
3625 }
3626 else if (bcd.prot==Private)
3627 {
3628 prot=Private;
3629 }
3630 //printf("%s::%s: prot=%d bcd.prot=%d result=%d\n",
3631 // qPrint(name()),qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()),mi->prot,
3632 // bcd.prot,prot);
3633
3634 if (prot!=Private || extractPrivate)
3635 {
3636 Specifier virt=mi->virt();
3637 if (virt==Normal && bcd.virt!=Normal) virt=bcd.virt;
3638
3639 if (inlineInheritedMembers)
3640 {
3641 if (!isStandardFunc(mi->memberDef()))
3642 {
3643 //printf(" insertMember '%s'\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3644 internalInsertMember(mi->memberDef(),prot,FALSE);
3645 }
3646 }
3647 //printf("Adding!\n");
3648 std::unique_ptr<MemberInfo> newMi = std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(mi->memberDef(),prot,virt,TRUE);
3649 newMi->setScopePath(bClass->name()+sep+mi->scopePath());
3650 newMi->setAmbigClass(mi->ambigClass());
3651 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(mi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3652 newMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3653 }
3654 }
3655 }
3656 }
3657 }
3658 }
3659 }
3660 //printf(" end mergeMembers\n");
3661}

1553 {

1557 {
1558 ol.writeObjectLink(fd->getReference(),fd->getOutputFileBase(),QCString(),fname);
1559 }
1560 else
1561 {
1562 ol.docify(fname);
1563 }
1564 ol.popGeneratorState();
1565
1566 // for other output formats
1567 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1568 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Html);
1569 if (fd->isLinkable())
1570 {
1571 ol.writeObjectLink(fd->getReference(),fd->getOutputFileBase(),QCString(),fname);
1572 }
1573 else
1574 {
1575 ol.docify(fname);
1576 }
1577 ol.popGeneratorState();
1578
1579 ol.endItemListItem();
1580 }
1581 if (!first) ol.endItemList();
1582

2387 }
2388 }
2389 else // non-Slice optimization: single header for class/struct/..
2390 {
2391 ol.startMemberHeader("nested-classes");
2392 }
2393 if (!header.isEmpty())
2394 {
2395 ol.parseText(header);
2396 }
2397 else if (lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL)
2398 {
2399 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trVhdlType(VhdlDocGen::ARCHITECTURE,FALSE));
2400 }
2401 else
2402 {
2403 ol.parseText(lang==SrcLangExt_Fortran ?
2404 theTranslator->trDataTypes() :
2405 theTranslator->trCompounds());
2406 }
2407 ol.endMemberHeader();
2408 ol.startMemberList();
2409 found=TRUE;
2410 }
2411 ol.startMemberDeclaration();
2412 ol.startMemberItem(anchor(),FALSE);
2413 QCString ctype = compoundTypeString();
2414 QCString cname = displayName(!localNames);
2415
2416 if (lang!=SrcLangExt_VHDL) // for VHDL we swap the name and the type
2417 {
2418 if (isSliceLocal())
2419 {
2420 ol.writeString("local ");
2421 }
2422 ol.writeString(ctype);
2423 ol.writeString(" ");
2424 ol.insertMemberAlign();
2425 }
2426 if (isLinkable())
2427 {
2428 ol.writeObjectLink(getReference(),
2429 getOutputFileBase(),
2430 anchor(),
2431 cname
2432 );
2433 }
2434 else
2435 {
2436 ol.startBold();
2437 ol.docify(cname);
2438 ol.endBold();
2439 }
2440 if (lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL) // now write the type
2441 {
2442 ol.writeString(" ");
2443 ol.insertMemberAlign();
2444 ol.writeString(VhdlDocGen::getProtectionName(VhdlDocGen::convert(protection())));
2445 }
2446 ol.endMemberItem();
2447
2448 // add the brief description if available
2449 if (!briefDescription().isEmpty() && Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC))
2450 {
2451 auto parser { createDocParser() };
2452 auto ast { validatingParseDoc(*parser.get(),
2453 briefFile(),briefLine(),this,0,
2454 briefDescription(),FALSE,FALSE,
2455 QCString(),TRUE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT)) };
2456 if (!ast->isEmpty())
2457 {
2458 ol.startMemberDescription(anchor());
2459 ol.writeDoc(ast.get(),this,0);
2460 if (isLinkableInProject())
2461 {
2462 writeMoreLink(ol,anchor());
2463 }
2464 ol.endMemberDescription();
2465 }
2466 }
2467 ol.endMemberDeclaration(anchor(),QCString());
2468 }
2469}

void ClassDefImpl::writeDocumentationContents ( OutputList &  ol,
const QCString &  pageTitle

private

Definition at line 2495 of file classdef.cpp.

2496{
2497 ol.startContents();
2498
2499 QCString pageType = " ";
2500 pageType += compoundTypeString();
2501
2502 bool exampleFlag=hasExamples();
2503
2504 //---------------------------------------- start flexible part -------------------------------
2505
2506 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
2507
2508 for (const auto &lde : LayoutDocManager::instance().docEntries(LayoutDocManager::Class))
2509 {
2510 switch (lde->kind())
2511 {
2512 case LayoutDocEntry::BriefDesc:
2513 writeBriefDescription(ol,exampleFlag);
2514 break;
2515 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassIncludes:
2516 if (lang==SrcLangExt_Slice)
2517 {
2518 writeIncludeFilesForSlice(ol);
2519 }
2520 else
2521 {
2522 writeIncludeFiles(ol);
2523 }
2524 break;
2525 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassInheritanceGraph:
2526 writeInheritanceGraph(ol);
2527 break;
2528 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassCollaborationGraph:
2529 writeCollaborationGraph(ol);
2530 break;
2531 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassAllMembersLink:
2532 //writeAllMembersLink(ol); // this is now part of the summary links
2533 break;
2534 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclStart:
2535 startMemberDeclarations(ol);
2536 break;
2537 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberGroups:
2538 writeMemberGroups(ol);
2539 break;
2540 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl:
2541 {
2542 ClassDefSet visitedClasses;
2543 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl*>(lde.get());
2544 if (lmd)
2545 {
2546 writeMemberDeclarations(ol,visitedClasses,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),lmd->subtitle(lang));
2547 }
2548 }
2549 break;
2550 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassNestedClasses:
2551 {
2552 const LayoutDocEntrySection *ls = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntrySection*>(lde.get());
2553 if (ls)
2554 {
2555 writeNestedClasses(ol,ls->title(lang));
2556 }
2557 }
2558 break;
2559 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclEnd:
2560 endMemberDeclarations(ol);
2561 break;
2562 case LayoutDocEntry::DetailedDesc:
2563 {
2564 const LayoutDocEntrySection *ls = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntrySection*>(lde.get());
2565 if (ls)
2566 {
2567 writeDetailedDescription(ol,pageType,exampleFlag,ls->title(lang));
2568 }
2569 }
2570 break;
2571 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefStart:
2572 startMemberDocumentation(ol);
2573 break;
2574 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassInlineClasses:
2575 writeInlineClasses(ol);
2576 break;
2577 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDef:
2578 {
2579 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef*>(lde.get());
2580 if (lmd)
2581 {
2582 writeMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang));
2583 }
2584 }
2585 break;
2586 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefEnd:
2587 endMemberDocumentation(ol);
2588 break;
2589 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassUsedFiles:
2590 showUsedFiles(ol);
2591 break;
2592 case LayoutDocEntry::AuthorSection:
2593 writeAuthorSection(ol);
2594 break;
2595 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceNestedNamespaces:
2596 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceNestedConstantGroups:
2597 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceClasses:
2598 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceConcepts:
2599 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceInterfaces:
2600 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceStructs:
2601 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceExceptions:
2602 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceInlineClasses:
2603 case LayoutDocEntry::ConceptDefinition:
2604 case LayoutDocEntry::FileClasses:
2605 case LayoutDocEntry::FileConcepts:
2606 case LayoutDocEntry::FileInterfaces:
2607 case LayoutDocEntry::FileStructs:
2608 case LayoutDocEntry::FileExceptions:
2609 case LayoutDocEntry::FileNamespaces:
2610 case LayoutDocEntry::FileConstantGroups:
2611 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludes:
2612 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludeGraph:
2613 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludedByGraph:
2614 case LayoutDocEntry::FileSourceLink:
2615 case LayoutDocEntry::FileInlineClasses:
2616 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupClasses:
2617 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupConcepts:
2618 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupInlineClasses:
2619 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupNamespaces:
2620 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupDirs:
2621 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupNestedGroups:
2622 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupFiles:
2623 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupGraph:
2624 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupPageDocs:
2625 case LayoutDocEntry::DirSubDirs:
2626 case LayoutDocEntry::DirFiles:
2627 case LayoutDocEntry::DirGraph:
2628 err("Internal inconsistency: member %d should not be part of "
2629 "LayoutDocManager::Class entry list\n",lde->kind());
2630 break;
2631 }

2633
2634 ol.endContents();

2809{
2810 // write inner classes after the parent, so the tag files contain
2811 // the definition in proper order!
2812 for (const auto &innerCd : m_impl->innerClasses)
2813 {
2814 ClassDefMutable *innerCdm = toClassDefMutable(innerCd);
2815 if (innerCdm)
2816 {
2817 if (
2818 innerCd->isLinkableInProject() && innerCd->templateMaster()==0 &&
2819 protectionLevelVisible(innerCd->protection()) &&
2820 !innerCd->isEmbeddedInOuterScope()
2821 )
2822 {
2823 msg("Generating docs for nested compound %s...\n",qPrint(innerCd->name()));
2824 innerCdm->writeDocumentation(ol);
2825 innerCdm->writeMemberList(ol);
2826 }
2827 innerCdm->writeDocumentationForInnerClasses(ol);
2828 }
2829 }
2830}

1752{
1753 if (m_impl->incInfo)
1754 {
1755 QCString nm;
1756 const StringVector &paths = Config_getList(STRIP_FROM_PATH);
1757 if (!paths.empty() && m_impl->incInfo->fileDef)
1758 {
1759 QCString abs = m_impl->incInfo->fileDef->absFilePath();
1760 QCString potential;
1761 unsigned int length = 0;
1762 for (const auto &s : paths)
1763 {
1764 FileInfo info(s);
1765 if (info.exists())
1766 {
1767 QCString prefix = info.absFilePath();
1768 if (prefix.at(prefix.length() - 1) != '/')
1769 {
1770 prefix += '/';
1771 }
1772
1773 if (prefix.length() > length &&
1774 qstricmp(abs.left(prefix.length()).data(), prefix.data()) == 0) // case insensitive compare
1775 {
1776 length = prefix.length();
1777 potential = abs.right(abs.length() - prefix.length());
1778 }
1779 }
1780 }
1781
1782 if (length > 0)
1783 {
1784 nm = potential;
1785 }
1786 }
1787
1788 if (nm.isEmpty())
1789 {
1790 nm = m_impl->incInfo->includeName;
1791 }
1792
1793 ol.startParagraph();
1794 ol.docify(theTranslator->trDefinedIn()+" ");
1795 ol.startTypewriter();
1796 ol.docify("<");
1797 if (m_impl->incInfo->fileDef)
1798 {
1799 ol.writeObjectLink(QCString(),m_impl->incInfo->fileDef->includeName(),QCString(),nm);
1800 }
1801 else
1802 {
1803 ol.docify(nm);
1804 }
1805 ol.docify(">");
1806 ol.endTypewriter();
1807 ol.endParagraph();
1808 }
1809
1810 // Write a summary of the Slice definition including metadata.
1811 ol.startParagraph();
1812 ol.startTypewriter();
1813 if (!m_impl->metaData.isEmpty())
1814 {
1815 ol.docify(m_impl->metaData);
1816 ol.lineBreak();
1817 }
1818 if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Local)
1819 {
1820 ol.docify("local ");
1821 }
1822 if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Interface)
1823 {
1824 ol.docify("interface ");
1825 }
1826 else if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Struct)
1827 {
1828 ol.docify("struct ");
1829 }
1830 else if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Exception)
1831 {
1832 ol.docify("exception ");
1833 }
1834 else
1835 {
1836 ol.docify("class ");
1837 }
1838 ol.docify(stripScope(name()));
1839 if (!m_impl->inherits.empty())
1840 {
1841 if (m_impl->spec & (Entry::Interface|Entry::Exception))
1842 {
1843 ol.docify(" extends ");
1844 bool first=true;
1845 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1846 {
1847 if (!first) ol.docify(", ");
1848 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1849 ol.docify(icd->name());
1850 first=false;
1851 }
1852 }
1853 else
1854 {
1855 // Must be a class.
1856 bool implements = false;
1857 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1858 {
1859 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1860 if (icd->isInterface())
1861 {
1862 implements = true;
1863 }
1864 else
1865 {
1866 ol.docify(" extends ");
1867 ol.docify(icd->name());
1868 }
1869 }
1870 if (implements)
1871 {
1872 ol.docify(" implements ");
1873 bool first = true;
1874 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1875 {
1876 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1877 if (icd->isInterface())
1878 {
1879 if (!first) ol.docify(", ");
1880 first = false;
1881 ol.docify(icd->name());
1882 }
1883 }
1884 }
1885 }
1886 }
1887 ol.docify(" { ... }");
1888 ol.endTypewriter();
1889 ol.endParagraph();
1890}

1603{
1604 bool haveDot = Config_getBool(HAVE_DOT);
1605 auto classGraph = Config_getEnum(CLASS_GRAPH);
1606
1607 if (classGraph == CLASS_GRAPH_t::NO) return;
1608 // count direct inheritance relations
1609 const int count=countInheritanceNodes();
1610
1611 bool renderDiagram = FALSE;
1612 if (haveDot && (classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::YES || classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::GRAPH))
1613 // write class diagram using dot
1614 {
1615 DotClassGraph inheritanceGraph(this,Inheritance);
1616 if (inheritanceGraph.isTooBig())
1617 {
1618 warn_uncond("Inheritance graph for '%s' not generated, too many nodes (%d), threshold is %d. Consider increasing DOT_GRAPH_MAX_NODES.\n",
1619 qPrint(name()), inheritanceGraph.numNodes(), Config_getInt(DOT_GRAPH_MAX_NODES));
1620 }
1621 else if (!inheritanceGraph.isTrivial())
1622 {
1623 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1624 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Man);
1625 ol.startDotGraph();
1626 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trClassDiagram(displayName()));
1627 ol.endDotGraph(inheritanceGraph);
1628 ol.popGeneratorState();
1629 renderDiagram = TRUE;
1630 }
1631 }
1632 else if ((classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::YES || classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::GRAPH) && count>0)
1633 // write class diagram using built-in generator
1634 {
1635 ClassDiagram diagram(this); // create a diagram of this class.
1636 ol.startClassDiagram();
1637 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Man);
1638 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trClassDiagram(displayName()));
1639 ol.enable(OutputGenerator::Man);
1640 ol.endClassDiagram(diagram,getOutputFileBase(),displayName());
1641 renderDiagram = TRUE;
1642 }
1643
1644 if (renderDiagram) // if we already show the inheritance relations graphically,
1645 // then hide the text version
1646 {
1647 ol.disableAllBut(OutputGenerator::Man);
1648 }
1649
1650 if (!m_impl->inherits.empty())
1651 {
1652 auto replaceFunc = [this,&ol](size_t entryIndex)
1653 {
1654 BaseClassDef &bcd=m_impl->inherits[entryIndex];
1655 ClassDef *cd=bcd.classDef;
1656
1657 // use the class name but with the template arguments as given
1658 // in the inheritance relation
1659 QCString displayName = insertTemplateSpecifierInScope(
1660 cd->displayName(),bcd.templSpecifiers);
1661
1662 if (cd->isLinkable())
1663 {
1664 ol.writeObjectLink(cd->getReference(),
1665 cd->getOutputFileBase(),
1666 cd->anchor(),
1667 displayName);
1668 }
1669 else
1670 {
1671 ol.docify(displayName);
1672 }
1673 };
1674
1675 ol.startParagraph();
1676 writeMarkerList(ol,
1677 theTranslator->trInheritsList(static_cast<int>(m_impl->inherits.size())).str(),
1678 m_impl->inherits.size(),
1679 replaceFunc);
1680 ol.endParagraph();
1681 }
1682
1683 // write subclasses
1684 if (!m_impl->inheritedBy.empty())
1685 {
1686
1687 auto replaceFunc = [this,&ol](size_t entryIndex)
1688 {
1689 BaseClassDef &bcd=m_impl->inheritedBy[entryIndex];
1690 ClassDef *cd=bcd.classDef;
1691 if (cd->isLinkable())
1692 {
1693 ol.writeObjectLink(cd->getReference(),cd->getOutputFileBase(),cd->anchor(),cd->displayName());
1694 }
1695 else
1696 {
1697 ol.docify(cd->displayName());
1698 }
1699 writeInheritanceSpecifier(ol,bcd);
1700 };
1701
1702 ol.startParagraph();
1703 writeMarkerList(ol,
1704 theTranslator->trInheritedByList(static_cast<int>(m_impl->inheritedBy.size())).str(),
1705 m_impl->inheritedBy.size(),
1706 replaceFunc);
1707 ol.endParagraph();
1708 }
1709
1710 if (renderDiagram)
1711 {
1712 ol.enableAll();
1713 }
1714}

2192
2193 // part 1a
2194 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2195 ol.disableAllBut(OutputGenerator::Html);
2196 { // only HTML only

2208 // part 1b

2249 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclStart:
2250 if (!isSimple) startMemberDeclarations(ol);
2251 break;
2252 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl:
2253 {
2254 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl*>(lde.get());
2255 if (lmd)
2256 {
2257 ClassDefSet visitedClasses;
2258 if (!isSimple) writeMemberDeclarations(ol,visitedClasses,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),lmd->subtitle(lang),TRUE);
2259 }
2260 }
2261 break;
2262 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberGroups:
2263 if (!isSimple) writeMemberGroups(ol,TRUE);
2264 break;
2265 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclEnd:
2266 if (!isSimple) endMemberDeclarations(ol);
2267 break;
2268 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefStart:
2269 if (!isSimple) startMemberDocumentation(ol);
2270 break;
2271 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDef:
2272 {
2273 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef*>(lde.get());
2274 if (lmd)
2275 {
2276 if (isSimple)
2277 {
2278 writeSimpleMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type);
2279 }
2280 else
2281 {
2282 writeMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),TRUE);
2283 }
2284 }
2285 }
2286 break;
2287 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefEnd:
2288 if (!isSimple) endMemberDocumentation(ol);
2289 break;
2290 default:
2291 break;
2292 }
2293 }
2294
2295 // part 3: close the block
2296 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2297 ol.disableAllBut(OutputGenerator::Html);
2298 { // HTML only
2299 ol.endIndent();
2300 }
2301 ol.popGeneratorState();
2302}

3031 cd->anchor(),

3033 md->category()->displayName() :
3034 cd->displayName());
3035 ol.writeString("</td>");
3036 ol.writeString("<td class=\"entry\">");

3038 SrcLangExt lang = md->getLanguage();
3039 if (
3040 (prot!=Public || (virt!=Normal && getLanguage()!=SrcLangExt_ObjC) ||
3041 md->isFriend() || md->isRelated() || md->isExplicit() ||
3042 md->isMutable() || (md->isInline() && Config_getBool(INLINE_INFO)) ||
3043 md->isSignal() || md->isSlot() ||

3047 )
3048 && memberWritten)
3049 {
3050 StringVector sl;
3051 if (lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL)
3052 {
3053 sl.push_back(theTranslator->trVhdlType(md->getMemberSpecifiers(),TRUE).str()); //append vhdl type
3054 }
3055 else if (md->isFriend()) sl.push_back("friend");
3056 else if (md->isRelated()) sl.push_back("related");
3057 else
3058 {
3059 if (Config_getBool(INLINE_INFO) && md->isInline())
3060 sl.push_back("inline");
3061 if (md->isExplicit()) sl.push_back("explicit");
3062 if (md->isMutable()) sl.push_back("mutable");
3063 if (prot==Protected) sl.push_back("protected");
3064 else if (prot==Private) sl.push_back("private");
3065 else if (prot==Package) sl.push_back("package");
3066 if (virt==Virtual && getLanguage()!=SrcLangExt_ObjC)
3067 sl.push_back("virtual");
3068 else if (virt==Pure) sl.push_back("pure virtual");
3069 if (md->isStatic()) sl.push_back("static");
3070 if (md->isSignal()) sl.push_back("signal");
3071 if (md->isSlot()) sl.push_back("slot");
3072// this is the extra member page
3073 if (md->isOptional()) sl.push_back("optional");
3074 if (md->isAttribute()) sl.push_back("attribute");
3075 if (md->isUNOProperty()) sl.push_back("property");
3076 if (md->isReadonly()) sl.push_back("readonly");
3077 if (md->isBound()) sl.push_back("bound");
3078 if (md->isRemovable()) sl.push_back("removable");
3079 if (md->isConstrained()) sl.push_back("constrained");
3080 if (md->isTransient()) sl.push_back("transient");
3081 if (md->isMaybeVoid()) sl.push_back("maybevoid");
3082 if (md->isMaybeDefault()) sl.push_back("maybedefault");
3083 if (md->isMaybeAmbiguous())sl.push_back("maybeambiguous");
3084 }
3085 bool firstSpan=true;
3086 for (const auto &s : sl)
3087 {
3088 if (!firstSpan)
3089 {
3090 ol.writeString("</span><span class=\"mlabel\">");
3091 }
3092 else
3093 {
3094 ol.writeString("<span class=\"mlabel\">");
3095 firstSpan=false;
3096 }
3097 ol.docify(s.c_str());
3098 }
3099 if (!firstSpan) ol.writeString("</span>");
3100 }
3101 if (memberWritten)
3102 {
3103 ol.writeString("</td>");
3104 ol.writeString("</tr>\n");
3105 }
3106 }
3107 }
3108 }
3109 //ol.endItemList();
3110
3111 if (!first) ol.writeString("</table>");
3112
3113 endFile(ol);
3114 ol.popGeneratorState();
3115}

2308 bool pdfHyperlinks = Config_getBool(PDF_HYPERLINKS);
2309 bool rtfHyperlinks = Config_getBool(RTF_HYPERLINKS);
2310 bool usePDFLatex = Config_getBool(USE_PDFLATEX);
2311
2312 // HTML only
2313 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2314 ol.disableAllBut(OutputGenerator::Html);
2315 ol.docify(" ");
2316 ol.startTextLink(getOutputFileBase(),
2317 anchor.isEmpty() ? QCString("details") : anchor);
2318 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trMore());
2319 ol.endTextLink();
2320 ol.popGeneratorState();
2321
2322 if (!anchor.isEmpty())
2323 {
2324 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2325 // LaTeX + RTF
2326 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Html);
2327 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Man);
2328 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Docbook);
2329 if (!(usePDFLatex && pdfHyperlinks))
2330 {
2331 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Latex);
2332 }
2333 if (!rtfHyperlinks)
2334 {
2335 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::RTF);
2336 }
2337 ol.docify(" ");
2338 ol.startTextLink(getOutputFileBase(), anchor);
2339 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trMore());
2340 ol.endTextLink();
2341 // RTF only
2342 ol.disable(OutputGenerator::Latex);
2343 ol.writeString("\\par");
2344 ol.popGeneratorState();
2345 }
2346}

2062 }
2063 }
2064 else // VDHL only

2071 }

2073 {
